query:
UPDATE players p
SET 
  completedCycles = COALESCE((
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ), 0),
  totalPuzzles = COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(totalPuzzles) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ), 0),
  totalCorrect = COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(correctCount) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ), 0),
  totalTimeMs = COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(totalTimeMs) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ), 0),
  accuracy = CASE 
    WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(totalPuzzles) FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.userId = p.userId), 0) = 0 THEN '0'
    ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(100 * COALESCE((SELECT SUM(correctCount) FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.userId = p.userId), 0) / COALESCE((SELECT SUM(totalPuzzles) FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.userId = p.userId), 1)), '%')
  END
WHERE p.userId IS NOT NULL;
